xBRIEFInfo.author: agent:cursor
xBRIEFInfo.description: Scope xBRIEF for About dialog feature blocks and Jirius Group LLC link

plan.title: About dialog: feature blocks + link Jirius Group LLC

narratives.Overview: Enhance the existing About dialog (src/components/AboutDialog.tsx, opened by the top-right icon button) in two ways: (1) present the app's features as distinct little blocks/cards so each is easy to see and visually separate, and (2) make the 'Jirius Group LLC' copyright text a hyperlink to https://jiriusgroup.com/. Keep the existing blurb and © line; add a features section above/within the dialog body with one small card per feature. Content/presentation change only — no audio-engine or dialog open/close behavior changes.
narratives.Requirements: FR-1: Add a features section to the About dialog rendering each major feature in its own distinct, visually separated block/card (e.g. a small grid/list of bordered/tinted tiles). Each card has a short feature name and a one-line description. FR-2: Cover the app's actual features, one card each. At minimum include: Colored noise (brown/pink/white EQ-shaped), Meditation sounds (scheduled bells/chimes/drones), Chords (single chords & progressions with timbres, arpeggio/strum/loop), Break reminders/prompts, To-do items, Time announcements (spoken time so you don't lose track of time). Include other real features if present (e.g. sleep timer) and omit any that don't actually exist — the implementer must verify against the codebase (src/components/*Panel.tsx, src/lib: breaks.ts, todos.ts, announce.ts, sleep-timer.ts, meditation.ts, chords.ts) so descriptions are accurate. FR-3: Make 'Jirius Group LLC' in the footer copyright line a link to https://jiriusgroup.com/. It must open in a new tab (target="_blank") with rel="noopener noreferrer", and keep the © symbol (e.g. '© Jirius Group LLC'). Style it as a visible link consistent with the app. FR-4: Keep the existing app blurb and dismissal behavior (close button / backdrop / Escape / focus return) unchanged. NFR-1: Match existing AboutDialog + src/app/globals.css styling conventions; the feature cards should look tidy and on-brand; no heavy new dependencies; fully offline (no remote assets). NFR-2: Accessibility — the features section uses sensible semantics (e.g. a list); the external link has discernible text ('Jirius Group LLC'); dialog semantics unchanged. NFR-3: Update the co-located AboutDialog test to cover the feature cards rendering and the Jirius link (href + target/rel); typecheck, lint, full test suite, and production build pass. NFR-4: Purely additive to the dialog content — do not change NoisePlayer trigger/placement (just merged in PR #128) or any audio engine.
narratives.Assumptions: A-1: The About dialog and its top-right icon trigger already exist (PRs #125, #128). This brief edits the dialog BODY only (AboutDialog.tsx) plus its styles in globals.css. A-2: The feature list should reflect the real app; the implementer verifies exact features from the codebase and writes concise, accurate one-liners. A-3: 'Little block' = a small card/tile with clear separation (border/background), arranged in a simple responsive grid or list.

items.title: src/components/AboutDialog.tsx — add a feature-cards section (one distinct block per real feature) and make 'Jirius Group LLC' a new-tab link to https://jiriusgroup.com/

narrative.Traces: FR-1, FR-2, FR-3, FR-4, NFR-2, NFR-4

items.title: src/app/globals.css — feature-card + about-link styling matching existing conventions (responsive, tidy)
Update AboutDialog test — assert feature cards render and Jirius link href/target/rel; verify gates/build
